name: courses_get
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific course by its ID or slug.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The course ID or slug identifier.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of linked resources to include.

elements.name: Machine Learning
elements.description: This course provides a broad introduction to machine learning, datamining, and statistical pattern recognition.
